chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Admiralty Suit No.10 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For orders on CMA No.540/2025. 2.For orders on CMA No.541/2025. 27.09.2025 Agha Zafar Ahmed, Advocate for the plaintiff. ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. This application is filed for the withdrawal of the present suit. Per learned Counsel for the plaintiff, the dispute between the plaintiff and defendant has been amicably settled out of the Court. Application is supported with the affidavit of Mr. Usman Imran authorized representative of the plaintiff duly sworn in the verification branch of this Court. Notice was ordered to be issued on the previous date. Consequently, the instant admiralty suit is hereby disposed of as withdrawn along with the pending application; Order passed on 25.09.2025 is recalled and the arrested vessel m.v. “De Rong 17” / Defendant No.1 is directed to be released forthwith, so also the arrest warrant, if any, issued in respect of the subject matter is hereby discharged / recalled. Office is directed to issue release orders. Suit is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Asif
